title: Partnership roadmap
description: A 12-month visual partnership plan shown on the AI Roadmap page. Per-client, shared schema. Shows the ongoing relationship — monthly deliverables, milestone expansions, and long-term value.

startMonth.description: The month the client relationship began (YYYY-MM). The roadmap starts here and spans 12 months forward.

cadence.description: Recurring monthly deliverable cadence, tailored per client based on work history.

deliverable.description: What is delivered each cycle (e.g., '30-second video', '1-minute film').

frequency.description: How often the recurring deliverable is produced.

amount.description: The size or scope of each deliverable (e.g., '30 seconds', '1 minute').

months.description: 12 monthly entries from the start month. Each month shows what Third i is delivering and any milestone expansions.

status.description: Whether this month is in the past, current, or future.

items.description: What Third i is delivering or expanding into this month.

type.description: The kind of work this item represents. Drives the SVG icon shown in the infographic.

title.description: Short title shown on the infographic card.

description.description: One-sentence plain-English explanation of what this item delivers.

milestone.description: True if this is a milestone expansion (Month 2, 4, 6+), not a recurring deliverable.

free.description: True if this milestone is free/unbillable (value audits, partnership extensions).

milestones.description: Summary of the key milestone expansions, shown as callouts on the infographic.

icon.description: Icon name for the milestone callout.

free.description: True if this milestone is free/unbillable.
